# argis-extensions

> Part of the Phenotype fleet. See https://github.com/KooshaPari/phenotype-apps for fleet-wide context.

## What this repo is

`argis-extensions` is a repo in the KooshaPari/Phenotype fleet.

## Build & run

```bash
git clone https://github.com/KooshaPari/argis-extensions.git
cd argis-extensions
# see SPEC.md for repo-specific instructions
```

## Code layout

- Source: see language-specific source dirs
- Tests: see test dirs
- Specs: SPEC.md, llms.txt

## Conventions

- See AGENTS.md § Conventions
- WORKLOG.md uses v2.1 schema (ADR-025)

## See also

- [phenotype-apps meta-repo](https://github.com/KooshaPari/phenotype-apps)
- [phenotype-registry](https://github.com/KooshaPari/phenotype-registry)
- 71-pillar audit: `findings/71-pillar-*.md` in the meta-repo
